reason: The diff clearly implements the stated intent to reduce HMR chunk list subscriptions by creating a single page-specific HMR chunk list instead of one per client component group, as evidenced by the new `get_client_references_chunks_for_hmr` function, the `hmr_chunk_list` method, the `root_main_files_per_page` manifest field, and comprehensive test coverage validating exactly one HMR subscription per page.
